reasoning: Koren, your main physiological limiter is the 9.3% power drop from your 5-min to 20-min efforts, pointing to issues with lactate clearance and aerobic base development. Your last ride was notably low intensity after extended rest, requiring controlled reintroduction to intensity. This workout will simulate the demands of the Cascade Springs climb in the Alpine Loop by focusing on over-unders, crucial for boosting fatigue resistance and improving power sustainability.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x (8 min @ 210W-225W, follow with 1 min @ 242W-256W) to enhance clearance and endurance.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
